subject: feat(import): wait for both ML models with dual progress bars
body:
Step 2 now waits for both the embedding model (smart grouping) and the
tag suggestion model (auto-tagging) before showing groups. Two separate
progress bars show download status for each model independently.

- useTagSuggestions: add modelProgress ref and waitForModel() (mirrors embeddings)
- ImportStepClassify: Promise.all both waitForModel calls, dual progress UI
- First import shows "Downloading models for first use — this only happens once"
- If either model fails, shows amber "Unavailable" and proceeds gracefully

Tags: import, ml, ux
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: auto-tagging-imports
Semver: minor

title: wait for both ML models with dual progress bars
